title: codereview-pass3-robustness: SFN delta pseudocode should explicitly require wrapping_sub or unsigned semantics in all languages
description: In spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:127 the C example uses unsigned subtraction which is correct for mod 2^32. Rust equivalent must use .wrapping_sub(u32). Python % operator or & 0xffffffff. Add explicit note for all 3 impl languages per test vector discipline. Cross-ref RFC 1982 more precisely. IETF style requires normative language for computation. File as P2 robustness. Also fix any P4 wording. Parent project-LICHEN-ttam
close_reason: Fixed in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:127-140 with explicit Rust/Python semantics, RFC 1982 cross-ref, 3 impl test vector note. Addressed P4 wording. 3 complete codereview passes (robustness, FSM/init, notation) completed with all findings (incl P4) fixed. IETF style consistent. bd ready --limit 5 run.
